Ignore macOS-specific metadata files to keep the repository clean across different operating systems.
.gitignore.after:
.**DS_Store
.DS_Store
.AppleDouble
.LSOverride
Icon
._*
.DocumentRevisions-V100

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore Linux-specific temporary and system files to prevent committing OS-specific artifacts.
Ignore Windows-specific system files and shortcuts to prevent committing OS-specific artifacts.
Ignore environment variable files to prevent committing sensitive credentials or local configuration.
Ignore local blob storage files to prevent committing large or sensitive storage artifacts.
Ignore VS Code specific process attachment files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the base image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on a Java 11 runtime would result in runtime errors due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibility.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Refactor the Dockerfile into a multi-stage build to separate the build environment from the runtime environment.
Add Maven installation and build steps within the Docker build stage to ensure the JAR is built inside the container.
Dockerfile.after: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y maven ... RUN mvn package -DskipTests=true

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the entrypoint to reference the specific generated JAR filename instead of a generic name.
Explicitly expose port 8000 and set the server port environment variable.

docker-compose.deploy.yml.general_idea: Update Docker Compose file format version from 2 to 3 to support newer features and syntax.
Rename the backend service from 'photo-api' to 'hilfling-backend' to reflect the new project name.
Update the backend service image to the new project-specific image name.
Add volume mount for static files to the backend service.
Define explicit dependencies for the backend service on postgres and blob storage.
Configure port mapping for the backend service to expose port 8080 on host port 8484.
Add environment variables for database configuration to the backend service.
Update Traefik labels for the backend service to use the new service name and domain.
Add a new static frontend service 'fg-static' with Traefik configuration.
docker-compose.deploy.yml.after:
fg-static:
    #image: fotogjengen/hilfling-static
    networks:
      - traefik
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.hilfling-rontend.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.routers.hilfling-static.entrypoints=websecure
      - traefik.http.routers.hilfling-static.rule=Host(`fg-static.nikzy.no`)
      - traefik.http.routers.hilfling-static.tls.certresolver=lets-encr

docker-compose.deploy.yml.general_idea: Add a new internal network 'hilfling-network' for service communication.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Docker Compose file format version from 2 to 3 to support newer features like networks and volumes definitions in the root level.
Add explicit network definition for internal service communication.
Add explicit volume definition for database persistence.
Add Traefik reverse proxy service for routing and load balancing.
Rename backend service and update its configuration to use the new network and environment variables.
Update backend service to depend on postgres and traefik services.
Configure backend service environment variables for database connection using environment variable substitution.
Update backend service port mapping to use port 8000 on the host.
Add Traefik labels to backend service for routing.
Rename postgres service container name and update its configuration.
Update postgres service to depend on traefik and use the new network.
Update postgres service environment variables to use environment variable substitution.
Add Traefik labels to postgres service for routing.
Add pgAdmin service for database administration.
Add static file serving service using Nginx.
docker-compose.yml.after:
fg-static:
    container_name: hilfling-static
    build:
      context: ./static-files
      dockerfile: Dockerfile

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Azure Blob Storage emulator service (Azurite) for local development.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version from 0.4.2 to 0.5.6 to align with newer project standards.
Add support for custom Maven repository URL, username, and password environment variables in the wrapper download logic.
Enforce TLS 1.2 for the PowerShell WebClient to ensure compatibility with modern security requirements.
Add verbose logging control via the MVNW_VERBOSE environment variable for wrapper download status messages.
Standardize CLI argument handling by introducing MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS variable.
Fix typo in comment from 'keystroke' to 'keystroke' (minor correction) and 'Maven2' to 'Maven'.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper script to version 0.5.6 to support newer Maven features and bug fixes.
Add support for custom Maven repository URL via MVNW_REPOURL environment variable.
Add support for authenticated downloads using MVNW_USERNAME and MVNW_PASSWORD environment variables.
mvnw.after:
if [ -z "$MVNW_USERNAME" ] || [ -z "$MVNW_PASSWORD" ]; then
            wget "$jarUrl" -O "$wrapperJarPath"
        else
            wget --http-user=$MVNW_USERNAME --http-password=$MVNW_PASSWORD "$jarUrl" -O "$wrapperJarPath"
        fi

mvnw.general_idea: Fix Cygwin path handling for the wrapper JAR download path to ensure compatibility with Windows-style paths.
Fix Cygwin path handling for the Java downloader class path to ensure compatibility with Windows-style paths.
mvnw.after:
javaClass="$BASE_DIR/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java"
        # For Cygwin, switch paths to Windows format before running javac
        if $cygwin; then
          javaClass=`cygpath --path --windows "$javaClass"`
        fi

mvnw.general_idea: Export MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS to standardize CLI argument retrieval across Windows and non-Windows executions.
Remove outdated TODO comment about classpath handling.
Update header comment to remove '2' from 'Maven2' for modern naming conventions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.9.RELEASE to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages, causing compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with JDK 21 and modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 11 would result in incorrect bytecode or build failures if strict toolchains are enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation dependencies with their Jakarta EE equivalents.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace). Using javax.* packages results in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SpringDoc OpenAPI dependencies to the Spring Boot 3 compatible version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older SpringDoc versions rely on javax.servlet and are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta Servlet API, causing runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Kotlin Maven plugin and compiler plugins to support Kotlin source compilation in the build.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the Kotlin plugin configured, Kotlin source files in src/main/kotlin will not be compiled, leading to missing class errors at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Kotlin standard library and reflection dependencies required for the application to run.
pom.xml.why_exists: Kotlin code requires the kotlin-stdlib and kotlin-reflect libraries on the classpath; missing them causes NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jackson Kotlin module to enable proper serialization of Kotlin data classes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without jackson-module-kotlin, Jackson may fail to serialize Kotlin data classes correctly (e.g., missing no-arg constructors or private setters), causing runtime serialization errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Lombok dependency as it is no longer used or compatible with the new Kotlin-based setup.
Remove Spotify dockerfile-maven-plugin in favor of other containerization strategies.
Add Flyway dependency for database migration management.
Add Ktorm dependencies for database access.
Add Azure Storage Blob SDK for cloud storage integration.
Add ImageScalr library for image processing.
Update test dependencies including Spek, JUnit Platform, and Mockito-Kotlin.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to handle Kotlin and Java compilation phases correctly.
Update Spring Boot Maven plugin version and configuration for Spring Boot 3.
Add external repositories for dependencies like Spek and Kotlinx.
Update groupId and description to reflect project rebranding.

postgres/Dockerfile.general_idea: Rename the default PostgreSQL database from 'photodb' to 'hilflingdb' to align with the new project branding.
Remove the custom SQL initialization script and its associated directory setup from the Docker image.

scripts/connect_db.sh.general_idea: Update database connection script to use specific database and user credentials instead of default ones.
scripts/connect_db.sh.before: docker-compose exec postgres psql photodb postgres
scripts/connect_db.sh.after: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U hilfling -d hilflingdb

scripts/dropdreacreatedb.sh.general_idea: Replace the database initialization script with explicit drop and create commands using a specific user and database name.
scripts/dropdreacreatedb.sh.after:
docker-compose exec postgres psql -U hilfling -d postgres --command "drop database hilflingdb"
docker-compose exec postgres psql -U hilfling -d postgres --command "create database hilflingdb"
